name: Ganso Co., Ltd.
summary: Ganso Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of baked foods in China. It offers special, fresh milk, mousse, ice cream, chocolate, new year, rabbit lantern festival, nut, moon, date, sesame, tabletop, pineapple, egg yolk, mung bean, walnut, and egg cakes; dumplings; dried pork; pastries; and fruit gift boxes. The company offers its products directly through a chain of stores and online e-commerce channels. Ganso Co., Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is based in Shanghai, China.
